rulings.Case Title: IN RE: ROBERT A. NAIFY LIVING TRUST DATED FEBRUARY 8, 1991
rulings.Calendar Matter: General And Special Demurrers By Co-Trustees John Sherwood And Edward C. Topham, For The Robert A. Naify Living Trust, To Second Amended Petition For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty; Notice Of Demurrer
rulings.Rulings: Demurrer to First Cause of Action is sustained with leave to amend on statute of limitations grounds. Demurrer to Fourth, Fifth, Six, and Ninth causes of action sustained without leave to amend, for failure to plead facts sufficient to constitute a cause of action. Demurrer to Seventh and Eight causes of action sustained with leave to amend, for failure to plead with requisite specificity as to the fraud causes of action. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, March 21, 2018.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: ROBERT A. NAIFY LIVING TRUST DATED FEBRUARY 8, 1991
rulings.Calendar Matter: Co-Trustees Notice Of Motion To Strike The Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Second Amended Petition Filed By Acela Cortese
rulings.Rulings: The Motion to Strike Memorandum of Points and Authorities is granted. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, March 21, 2018.
